title: The European Security Studies Conference closes in Stockholm
excerpt: The annual conference wrapped up two days of panels and roundtables at Stockholm University — its first edition under the ESSC name, jointly organised with COST Action NetSec and Stockholm University.

title: Two papers win the 2026 European Security Studies Prize
excerpt: “Do Parliaments Dream of Cyber Power?” and “Telegram in Russia's Information Strategy” shared this year's European Security Studies Prize, awarded with the Journal of Strategic Studies.

title: The inaugural NetSec Early-Career Scholars Summer School
excerpt: Doctoral researchers gathered at Stockholm University for three days of training and mentoring in the lead-up to the conference.

title: EISS 2025: the annual conference in Thessaloniki
excerpt: The 2025 edition met at the University of Macedonia. The full programme and a photo gallery are in the archive.
